Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Hey, man. I was gonna wait to tell you this until we sit down to eat, but...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}I've decided to go to Kyushu with Emiri, so this'll be the last time we have ramen together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}...I didn't think he'd get so serious about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}He's just a kid. He must have misunderstood.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}I did it for my own track record as a teacher. He should be grateful...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}Seems like he's the one who spread the rumors.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1001}And now other students are...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 5 21 0 1002}Just a little longer. We'll celebrate our wedding soon enough.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}So I guess today was the day she was leaving.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}I was so excited about going with her that I... I...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}S-Stop it! Why are you trying to make me feel better? You should be laughing at me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Ugh! I'm such an idiot... A stupid, stupid idiot. I should've known this would happen![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}It was so obvious she wasn't serious about me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}It's not Emiri's fault, anyway. I screwed things up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 101 61 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Hahaha... It is kinda funny, isn't it? Ahh...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tomochika is trying to tough out the pain.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like our relationship is stronger...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to walk home with Tomochika.[n]{f 1 1}
